name: Notion Integration Adapter
description: Implements the Notion sync adapter including data mapping and store-level adapter logic for syncing PRD items with Notion databases.

riskMetrics.riskJustification: Cohesion 0.14 is a zone-size artifact: with only 2 production files (notion-map.ts, notion-adapter.ts) plus their Notion schema, the ratio of internal to external imports is inherently low. The files form a tight functional unit — notion-map provides bidirectional mapping consumed exclusively by notion-adapter. Pin of integration-schemas/notion.ts reunites the Notion contract in a single zone. Physical relocation of notion-map.ts from core/ to store/ colocates it with its sole consumer.
